name: Whip & Flip
author: Poki
description: Whip & Flip is an action game where you whip, flip, and smash everything in your way! Stay sharp as ragdoll monsters and brainrot enemies rush toward you, then use ropes and wild weapons to grab, swing, and fling them aside to survive. Timing and reflexes are key if you want to stay alive. Do you have what it takes to become the ultimate wrangling master? How to play Whip & Flip? Click or tap to hit. Who created Whip & Flip? Whip & Flip is created by GeniGames. Play their other games on Poki: Pro Shooter , I Am Hall Security , Flying Wheels Evolution and Perfect Landing, Plane Pilot ! How can I play Whip & Flip for free? You can play Whip & Flip for free on Poki. Can I play Whip & Flip on mobile devices and desktop? Whip & Flip can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
